dict.string: FarmGuardian needs camera access to take pictures of crop leaves for disease detection.
FarmGuardian needs photo library access to upload crop leaf images.
FarmGuardian needs location access to provide region-specific farming recommendations.
FarmGuardian needs location access to mark your farm on the map.
FarmGuardian needs location access for geospatial mapping features.
FarmGuardian may need microphone access for voice input features.
